args.prompt:
Extract all key information from this 8-K filing filed April 2, 2024 by US Steel. Include: filing type, date, any material definitive agreements, any updates on the merger with Nippon Steel, any changes in business operations, financial results, regulatory updates, or any other significant events. Be specific about any numbers, dates, or conditions mentioned.

Document: {{us_steel_8k_apr2_2024}}

call.purpose: Extract merger-related updates from April 2, 2024 8-K to check for consistency with earlier sources.
